string.text: Supervision: Talk to hunters
Stalkers wrote me a message that they want to offer me work. It is worth talking to them on this topic.
Exercise:
Destroy the pack of racks
Destroy the pack of wild boars
Destroy a pack of blind dogs
Destroy the pack of snorkes
Destroy the pack tushkan
Safari: Destroy mutants
It is necessary to destroy all mutants.
Broken plane: unlock the memory module
You need to find a mechanic who can unlock the memory module found on the plane.
"Black box": unlock the black box
It is necessary to find a mechanic who can decode and open a black box from a helicopter.
Time of change: wait for news from the colonel
I need to wait until the colonel tells me that the helicopter finally arrived ...
New life contract: talk with Athena
I was able to help Karp. Now, nothing holds me in the zone. I must say about this Athena.
Illusion: Find Carp
Where am I? Where is the carp? What happened? Am I in the complex again? You need to find a carp.
Carp reincarnation: give the artifact carp
The swamp doctor configured the artifact "Compass". Now you need to give it to the carp.
Carp reincarnation: bring an artifact to the doctor
I have artifact "Compass". Now you need to bring it to the swamp doctor so that he will examine him.
Carp reincarnation: pick up the artifact "Compass"
Having jumped into an anomaly, I got to the island. There I found a compass artifact. It remains only to pick it up.
Carp reincarnation: jump into teleport
You need to jump into an anomaly to get to the island.
Carp reincarnation: meets with a swamp doctor
Perhaps the swamp doctor will help Karp. You need to meet him. Now he is at the Psi Road factory.
Carp reincarnation: Find a way to help a friend
You need to find out how to help Karp with his mysterious abnormal "disease". It is worth asking stalkers about a certain "swamp doctor".
Last jerk: get out of the complex
It is more necessary to get out of the C-11 complex. Solomon left very little, after which he will destroy the complex.
Sector-11: Explore the laboratory
It is necessary to find the control center for this complex.
Sector-11: penetrate the laboratory
I have a key card from the laboratory. Now you need to get to the S-11 laboratory.
Crazy ecologist: inspect the hill
In the PDA, the scientist had strange notes. In one of them, he said that he buried the key card on the hill against the wall. You have to search the hill.
Crazy ecologist: inspect the hill
In the PDA, the scientist had strange notes. In one of them, he said that he had buried the key card on the hill against the wall. You have to search the hill.
Crazy ecologist: to inspect the corpse of a scientist
For some reason, the scientist shot himself, it is necessary to inspect his corpse, the key card from the S-11 laboratory must be with him.
Crazy ecologist: check the place
According to the information received from stalkers, it is worth checking the place where the light burns at night. This is in the village, in the tower.
Crazy ecologist: find a scientist

It is necessary to find a scientist who used to work in the Sector-11 laboratory most likely he has an access key. According to the information received, now he has gone crazy and lives somewhere on the surface in the vicinity of the "dome". Maybe stalkers know where he is, it is worth finding out everything.
Survive at all costs: talk to Athena
It is worth discussing further plans with Athena.
Survive at all costs: talk with carp

What happened again ... It seems that I saw the lame again. Together with Solomon and his detachment, we made his way through the collector, and then ... everything is like in a fog. Now you need to talk with the carp, maybe he knows something.
On the bones of the fallen: explore the C-11 complex
Together with the Solomon detachment, it is necessary to explore the sector-11 complex and find a laboratory in it.
On the bones of the fallen: supply power to the control panel

Together with the Solomon detachment, it is necessary to break into the sector-11 complex and find a laboratory there. The door is de -energized, you need to look for the shirt in the dispatch and serve food at the doorbell.
On the bones of the fallen: Find the way to the laboratory
On the bones of the fallen: to recapture
On the bones of the fallen: to follow Solomon
On the bones of the fallen: to eliminate the pseudo -gygant
On the bones of the fallen: to break through to the S-11 laboratory
Together with the Solomon detachment, it is necessary to break into the sector-11 complex and find a laboratory there.
Hermoder: go with Solomon to S-11
Solomon said that this was his last task for me. You need to go with them in the complex "Sector-11".
Hermodaver: Discuss with Solomon Further plans
The Harmodver is seasoned and works. The key card is available. You need to discuss this with Solomon.
Harkodaver: Bring the canister Tengiza
The canister is filled, you need to give it to Tengiz.
Harmodaver: Find and drain gasoline in the canister
As Tengiz explained to me, there is not enough fuel to launch hermodver, you need to wander around the neighborhood and drain gasoline from old cars.
Harkodaver: Take the canister
For gasoline, you need a container, it is worth taking the canister.
Harkodver: Talk to Tengiz
Learn about the door of the Tengiz technique.
Harkodaver: Talk to Solomon
I found and brought the technique, now we need to discuss our further affairs with Solomon.
Harkodver: Talk to Tengiz
I was advised to turn to the Tengiz technique. This is the one that is in the stalker bar.
Harkodaver: Find the technique
In order for the door to the S-11 to work, one key card is not enough. For its repair, it is necessary to find a technique - which could launch it.
Sector-11: bring the key card to Solomon
I have a key card. It remains to bring her to Solomon, but before that you need to make sure whether Athena is alive.
Sector-11: get out and bring money
I found a person named: Cyparis, who can bring me a key card, but, for a round sum (150 thousand rubles).
Sector-11: Meet Cyparis
They told me that cypress may have a key card. You need to meet and talk with him on this topic.
Sector-11: Find the key card
As Karp asked me, I agreed to cooperate with Solomon. Now, my task is to find the key card from the entrance to the C-11 complex.
Good life contract: inspect the laptop
In the laptop of mercenaries, you can have useful information about the "sector-11". You need to inspect it.
Good life contract: get information
You need to go to the sector-11 complex, and get information about this complex there. Mercenaries can meet there, they need to be eliminated.
New clues: Talk to the carp
You need to find out a lot from the carp ... I hope he will give me answers, the answer to which I want to know.
New clues: Turn on the installation
Karp tells me to launch the installation in this laboratory, for which I don't know, but he can be trusted.
New clues: follow the carp
Carp knows where Solomon, it is worth listening to him.
Thirst for blood: find and kill Solomon
Thirst for blood: Kill Solomon
Thirst for blood: follow the mercenary
Higher: talk to a forester
The forester has information for me, I think this is something important, you need to meet him at the checkpoint.
Thirst for blood: find and kill Solomon
Solomon is alive. I saw him with my own eyes. He took Athena with him, and she was the only hope of getting out of the perimeter. I have to find her and kill her "my old friends."
Transaction with the SBU: Discuss the conditions with Athena
It is necessary to discuss the terms of the transaction with Athena. I need a perimeter, and it can organize a helicopter to me.
Signal for help: Return your things
It is necessary to pick up your clothes that this moron was quiet.
Signal for help: inspect the corpse of a quiet
This freak hid my things somewhere. It is necessary to inspect it.
Signal for help: kill the quiet
The bastards made me an ambush. It's time to finish them.
Signal for help: help or ignore
Someone asks me for help. Can go to the signal and see what is there?
Rezon of conscience: kill the military
The choice was made ... It is necessary to eliminate the military.
Rezon of conscience: warn or kill the military
Athena works at the SBU. She asked to liquidate the military who promised me the way home ... But, she also claims that she could organize my way home. What to do ... I have to make a choice.
Unknown sender: check the point
Someone wants to meet me at the P-I plant. Perhaps this is a carp, or maybe Solomon itself? Hmm ... I'm full of curiosity.
Heart -to -heart conversations: talk to Colonel Wind
It is necessary to clarify with the military when my ticket will arrive home ... I would quickly leave the zone.
Ghosts of the past: Make a choice
Take a prototype of medicine or you should do without it ...
Ghosts of the past: will meet with Athena
Karp told a lot of interesting things while we went to the VNZ. We need to ask Athena's medicine for medicines for the virus.
Ghosts of the past: Meet with carp
Karp returned from the dead again ... Now he is at the checkpoint. Asks about the meeting.
Ticket home: talk to the military
I established a connection. Now, I think, it's worth talking to the military about this.
Ticket home: work for the military
The military has the opportunity to leave the zone using helicopters. It is necessary to help them to earn your ticket to the big land.
Ticket home: will meet with the military
The military sent a message about what they wanted to meet. Perhaps they have not forgotten about me yet, and I will still leave the zone.
Laboratory: Find the key card
The door in the laboratory is closed. The decoder will not help here, you need to find the key card from this door.
Spider thread: bring Athena's documents
I found important documents. It is necessary to convey them to Athena as soon as possible.
Spider thread: Find information about the virus
Spider thread: get to the laboratory
Spider thread: get to the M-15 complex
Athena promised to help me with medicine. You need to get to the Metro-15 complex and find useful documents about this virus.
Documents: Find useful information for scientists
If I bring many important documents about the experiments and the virus, from the Metro-15 laboratory, I think that scientists will pay well.
History of "Debt": Find interested persons

A personal PDA was found on the body of the founder of the вЂњdebtвЂќ, who died in an anomaly. It is necessary to convey this device to those who are interested in the last minutes of the life of the legendary founder of the group.
Hero of the novel: Return things to Athena
I have her things. It is necessary to return them to her, and get information about the virus.
Hero of the novel: Find a stalker in the nickname "Quiet"
Hero of Roman: Help Athena

In order for Athena to share with me information about the virus, I need to help her return her things that some stalker took the nickname "Quietly". According to her, he is now in a bar of "stalkers".
Sudden Return: Talk to the Forester
What happened in the tunnel I do not know. The conductor and forester disappeared somewhere, and now the forester has returned. You need to find out from him what happened.
Sudden return: will meet with carp
Carp is alive ... or not alive ... I do not know what is happening. But I must meet him.
On the threshold of death: ask people about the virus
Am I infected? Damn spider in D-6 ... What is happening to me? I have only questions. Maybe: does anyone know anything? It is worth asking the people.
On the threshold of death: talk to Athena
They told me that a certain Athena may know about the virus. She is somewhere on a momentum. Okay ... I'll ask her.
Special order: pick up the goods
The order has been delivered, it is necessary to pick it up from the nimble.
Special Order: Expect delivery
The order is made, you need to wait until the nimble gets the goods.
Sudden disappearance: find the conductor
The controller is killed. It seems that for some time I was in a disconnection ... Where did the conductor go?
Sudden disappearance: to find a forester
The controller is killed. It seems that for some time I was in a disconnection ... Where did the forester go?
As soon as I help the carp, we will go home, beyond the perimeter. I, Athena and Carp.
New life contract: get out of the zone
I just want to get out of Choso as soon as possible. Nothing here holds me here.
Way to a dead city: leave the dungeon
According to the conductor - we are in the dead city. You need to leave the dungeon with the forester.
Way to a dead city: destroy a mutant
It is necessary to kill the controller until he killed me.
Steps of silence: find a group or quiet
The coordinates of the group come from the underground complex M-15. The collector is open, now you need to find the source of their signal ...
Unknown Monster: Eliminate the mutant
Unknown monster: search for a mutant
Unknown monster: bring a piece of flesh
Anomalous plant: get an abnormal plant
Anomalous plant: bring an abnormal plant
The professor is ready to give the densifier module if I do a couple of his tasks.
Group search: open a collector using a key card
The coordinates of the group come from the underground complex M-15. I found a key card, with its help you can open the way to the collector.
Group searches: hack control panel
The coordinates of the group come from the underground complex M-15. I found the densifier module, with it you can hack the control panel and open the way to the collector.
Group searches: Find the key card or decoder

The coordinates of the group come from the underground complex M-15. The path to the collector blocks the lattice on the control panel. It is necessary to find the key card, either the decoder with which you can hack, or open the way to the collector. At the expense of the decoder, you can talk with scientists. Where to look for the key card is unknown.
Group searches: inspect the path to the collector
The coordinates of the group come from the underground complex M-15. You need to inspect the path to the collector.
Step in the unknown: go to the "M-15 complex"
They made an ambush intentionally ... But who and why? So ... okay ... The coordinates of the group come from the underground complex, so I'm going there.
Step into the unknown: to inspect the attackers
Mercenaries are killed. You need to inspect them.
Step into the unknown: eliminate mercenaries
This is an ambush, it is necessary to eliminate all the attackers.
Step into the unknown: Follow the sergeant
The sergeant recorded the coordinates of our group. It is necessary to proceed with it to the signal point and inspect it.
Step into the unknown: to inspect the received coordinates
The sergeant recorded the coordinates of our group. It is necessary to proceed to the signal point and inspect it.
Search for the group: Meet with Sergeant Shitchin
The sergeant recorded the coordinates of our group. You need to meet him.
Group search: follow the sergeant's hat
The sergeant recorded the coordinates of the place - our group. It is necessary to get to this place with it.
Radio Poles: Turn on the radio transmitter and configure the closed channel
The interference is eliminated. The radio transmitter works. You need to configure it and contact your own on a special channel.
Radio Poles: Install the radio transmitter in the indicated place
The interference is eliminated. The radio transmitter works. You need to configure it and contact your own on a special channel.
Radio Parts: deactivate all "interference"
In order for the radio transmitter to be able to catch the coordinates again, it is necessary to find muffins that prevent him from doing this and chopping them off.
Radio Plugs: Correct an unknown signal
The interference is eliminated. But something else prevents the main signal of the military. You need to deal with it.
"Black roses"
Quest Ilya Klimkina. So far in the process of implementation.
Strange dream: to understand what happened during the evacuation
According to the quiet, we got into an anomaly and could not cope with the management ... But, I have completely different details of what happened - what happened there ... I need to figure it out.
"The heart of the oasis and compass"

It is necessary to find two legendary artifacts: the heart of the oasis and compass. Since they were recently stolen, and, according to scientists, both artifacts should be sought in the M -15 complex - because Everyone is sure that the thief fled there. One group has already been sent to the M-15. You need to meet and talk with the group, find two legendary artifacts, if possible to punish the thief, and transfer the finds to the professor.
Postman: transfer the letter to scientists
Shcherban asked to pass scientists on "VNZ" parcel.
Night hunting: wait for the night
You need to wait for the night and track the mutant, who terrorizes the stalker camp.
Night hunting: kill pseudox
Kill the pseudo -ps that terrorizes the stalker camp.
Night hunting: pick up the award
Get a reward from the stalker "Spirit" for the destruction of the mutant.
Left box: Find and bring a container
Stalker the Spirit, asked for him to find a box for him, which they could not carry out at night due to heavy weight. You need to bring the box back to the stalker.
Container secrets: find a way to hack a case
You need to find and find out from the technique - whether it can hack the Case Castle without damaging its contents.
Tools: bring three sets of tools equipment

The technician asked to find three sets of tools: for rough work, for thin work, and also a set for calibration. The technician will pay for the tools, make a discount on the repair and modernization of weapons and armor.
Hypothesis: Find a quiet at the factory
Find a quiet or his group in the vicinity of the plant.
Hypothesis: wait for news from quiet
Wait until the quiet or his group is not in contact with me.
Radio frequencies: will meet and talk with Sergeant Shitchin
The quiet sent the SOS signal. But the coordinates are not determined ... We need to talk about this with the sergeant of the hat.
Radio frequency: talk about the radio transmitter with the technician

The quiet sent the SOS signal. But the coordinates are not determined ... Sergeant Shitchin decided to go to the VNZ - Ray, and so far I will talk on this subject with a technician in the checkpoint camp.
Radio materials: get materials from the list
The equipment needs radio materials, they can be found at the P-I test complex. If everything found from the list is delivered, the technician will be able to make any modernization.
Radio Materials: Bring the Technique Materials

I found all the materials at the P-I test complex. They need to be attributed to their technique. If everything found from the list is delivered, the technician will be able to make any modernization.
Epilogue: Find a way out of the laboratory "S11"

Everyone died. The operation is failed. I have no choice, you just need to get out of the laboratory and, if possible, somehow transfer the SBU container with information about the project: "Sector-11".
Stones on the road: Find 4 explosives
The door to the main body is blocked. The remote control is broken. It is necessary to check the hangar - there should be military explosives. It is necessary to find 4 charges.
Stones on the road: undermine the door with explosives
The door to the main body is blocked. The remote control is broken. With the help of 4 explosives - you need to undermine the door.
Dust to dust: eliminate mercenaries
It is necessary to kill the squad of the marters who attacked you. Thus - finally breaking the deal. The scientist died with important information ...
Dust to dust: get to the meeting zone with your
The transaction is finally disrupted. The scientist died with important information ... It is necessary to get alive to the meeting place and with their own - to tear the claws beyond the perimeter.
Enemy among his own: talk to the locals, learn something about quiet
It is necessary to clarify the situation. It is worth talking with local stalkers in a camp on a checkpoint. Maybe someone knows something important.
Barvinka medicines: Find couriers or medicine container

Barvinka couriers had to bring him a container with medicines for a long time, but there is still no news from them. The latest active coordinates of their PDAs are still blinking. It is necessary to check.
Barvinka Medications: Bring the Container to the Medist
Barvinka couriers are dead, the container was with them. It is necessary to take it to the doctor and talk about what happened.
Spider thread: talk to the head of the camp
It is necessary to understand what is happening and first, it is worth talking to the head in this camp.
New couriers: Find stalkers for working on Barvinka
Barvinok asked to find new couriers for him that would supplied him with medicines.
New couriers: tell a barwaur about stalkers
Barvinok asked to find new couriers for him that would supplied him with medicines. I found several experienced stalkers who agree to work for it. You need to inform the doctor about this.
Measurements: remove data from devices
Measurements: bring data to Shcherban
Examine the scanner near the anomaly "acid cloud"
Examine the scanner near the anomaly "Electro-Gril"
To examine the scanner near the anomaly "Fire drone"
Shcherban asked to examine the scanner near the anomaly and remove the scan results from it.
Shcherban asked to examine the scanner near the anomaly and remove the scan results from it. I have the results, I need to transfer them to Shcherban.
Shcherban asked to examine the scanner near the Elekt-Gril anomaly and remove the scan results from it.
Shcherban asked to examine the scanner near the Elekt-Gril anomaly and remove the scan results from it. I have the results, I need to transfer them to Shcherban.
Shcherban asked to examine the scanner near the anomaly "Fiery Uzvalnik" and remove the scan results from it.
Shcherban asked to examine the scanner near the anomaly "Fiery Uzvalnik" and remove the scan results from it. I have the results, I need to transfer them to Shcherban.
Shcherban asked to examine the scanner near the anomaly "acid cloud" and remove the scan results from it.
Shcherban asked to examine the scanner near the anomaly "acid cloud" and remove the scan results from it. I have the results, I need to transfer them to Shcherban.
